case_title: ALICE BARNES VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-05-2004 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RHONDA FUNG. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARNES, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-19-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-04-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-19-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ALICE BARNES, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-03-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-20-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JOANN PRIOR. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-03-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-05-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ALICE BARNES, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-19-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-03-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: BRENDA FIELDS. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-19-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2003 CONTINUED TO JAN-05-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Fung. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2003 Continued To Jan-05-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/5/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Joann Prior. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-03-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2003 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Brenda Fields. (212)
